prompt: We sent an invoice for 14988 EUR to Northwave Ltd (org no. 972362980) when the exchange rate was 11.80 NOK/EUR. The customer has now paid, but the rate is 12.25 NOK/EUR. Register the payment and post the exchange rate difference (agio) to the correct account.
